reasoning: The BITCOIN Act (S.954) was reintroduced on March 11, 2025, by Senator Lummis and referred to the Senate Banking Committee. As of April 27, there is no evidence that the bill has advanced out of committee or has been scheduled for a floor vote. Given the notoriously slow pace of the US Senate, an independent bill of this magnitude requires hearings, markups, scheduling, and potentially overcoming a filibuster (requiring 60 votes). With only three days until the April 30th deadline, passing this legislation is virtually impossible. A controversial bill authorizing the purchase of 1 million Bitcoin would not pass by unanimous consent. Polymarket odds were also at 1% on April 17, reflecting the extreme unlikelihood of passage. Therefore, I estimate the probability at the minimum possible.
